# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_prefix_list (Resource)

Configure OSPFv3 prefix lists.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_quagga_ospf6_prefix_list" "example" {
  name            = "OSPF6_PL"
  action          = "permit"
  sequence_number = "10"
  network         = "2001:db8::/32"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Set permit for match or deny to negate the rule. One of `"permit"`, `"deny"`.
- `name` (String) The name of this prefix list.
- `network` (String) The network to match.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this prefix list. Defaults to `true`.
- `sequence_number` (String) The sequence number. Defaults to `""`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the OSPFv3 prefix list.

## Import

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, use an [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) to import opnsense_quagga_ospf6_prefix_list using the `id`. For example:

```terraform
import {
  to = opnsense_quagga_ospf6_prefix_list.example
  id = "<opnsense-resource-id>"
}
```

Using `terraform import`, import opnsense_quagga_ospf6_prefix_list using the `id`. For example:

```console
% terraform import opnsense_quagga_ospf6_prefix_list.example <opnsense-resource-id>
```
